name: Plantain Fan
description: The Plantain Fan, also known as the Banana Leaf Fan, is a magical artifact deeply rooted in Chinese mythology, particularly within the narrative of the Journey to the West. It is most famously wielded by Princess Iron Fan (also known as Rakshasi), a powerful demoness and the wife of the Bull Demon King. This fan is no ordinary cooling device; it possesses the extraordinary ability to control winds and weather, capable of extinguishing the raging flames of the Flaming Mountains, a formidable obstacle blocking the path of the Tang Monk and his disciples on their westward journey. Legend states that the fan was created from a giant plantain leaf that absorbed the essence of the heavens and the earth over centuries, imbuing it with potent magical properties. The fan's power is not merely limited to extinguishing flames; it can also summon powerful gusts of wind strong enough to blow away entire armies or create protective barriers. Obtaining the Plantain Fan becomes a crucial objective for Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, as it represents the only reliable means of crossing the Flaming Mountains and continuing their pilgrimage. The struggle to acquire the fan from the fiercely protective Princess Iron Fan forms a significant and dramatic episode in the Journey to the West, highlighting themes of perseverance, cunning, and the eventual triumph of good over evil. The Plantain Fan, therefore, symbolizes not only immense power but also the challenges and sacrifices inherent in the pursuit of enlightenment and the completion of a sacred mission. Its existence underscores the rich tapestry of magical realism woven into Chinese folklore and the belief in the potential for ordinary objects to be imbued with extraordinary abilities through supernatural means.
subtitle: Wind-controlling artifact of immense power
material: Giant Plantain Leaf imbued with magic
origin: Created from a magical plantain leaf over centuries
currentLocation: Unknown, possibly lost or hidden in a demon realm

keyMyths.title: Journey to the West: Extinguishing the Flaming Mountains
keyMyths.description: Sun Wukong must obtain the Plantain Fan from Princess Iron Fan to quell the flames blocking their path. The conflict highlights the fan's power and the challenges in acquiring it.

keyMyths.title: Princess Iron Fan's Possession
keyMyths.description: Princess Iron Fan's control over the Plantain Fan makes her a formidable opponent. Her reluctance to relinquish the fan stems from its power and her desire to protect her domain.

sources.author: Wu Cheng'en
sources.description: The primary source for the Plantain Fan and its associated mythology.
